subcodes.first_line: In this day the essence of praise and the pure glorification are reserved for those souls who, in the Name of the Lord of Creation, are seated upon the Crimson Ark [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الیوم جوهر حمد و ساذج ثنا مخصوص نفوسیست که باسم مالک وری بر سفینه حمرا جالسند
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
